_comment: Firebase Realtime Database layout for the Zero Waste Smart Fridge. Recreate this structure or import it. Timestamps are Unix seconds. Alerts are NOT stored - the app derives them live from sensors + products + camera state.

sensors._comment: Written by the ESP32 DevKit every ~5 s. The app shows 'ESP32 Sensor Board Offline' when updatedAt is older than 60 s.

camera._comment: Written by the app when the ESP32-CAM IP is saved on the Camera screen, so every team member's app shares the same address.

products._comment: Written by the app after it scans a product QR code from the camera. The node key is the productId.
